implementation_summary.summary: CP00-687 closes the RP22 External Integrations I P07 synthetic fixture/test/evidence/review/closeout tail and P08 evidence contract foundation bridge over 150 planned units from RP22.P07.M06.S03 through RP22.P08.M02.S14 while keeping fixture, test, permission, audit, review, Hermes, persistence, and command runtimes closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-687 RP22.P07.M06.S03-RP22.P08.M02.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
